_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: Compared with the predominantly cytoplasmic staining of AHR in the untreated control NFFs, HCQ appeared to induce the cytoplasmic-to-nuclear translocation of AHR
details: 50 μM HCQ induced cytoplasmic-to-nuclear translocation of AHR
